title: Wraparound Facilitation/Community Support * Hispanic/Latino Community - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Youth Services > Wraparound Facilitation/Community Support * Hispanic/Latino Community 1 Matching Service Providers Refine Results - Select - No Filter Hispanic/Latino Community Native American Community Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF PLAZA DE NUESTRA COMUNIDAD EUGENE MAIN OFFICE HUMAN SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Case managers provide comprehensive, wraparound human and social services. Staff intervene in crisis situations with direct assistance, classes, referrals, and advocacy. Offer assistance to women and children in distress, and a safe place for runaway teenagers. 195 W 12th Avenue Eugene, OR 97401 Eligibility: Unrestricted; primarily focus is Latino and immigrant population Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-noon and 1pm-6pm Email (541) 687-2667 Get Directions Visit Website More Details PLAZA DE NUESTRA COMUNIDAD HUMAN SERVICES
